title: Which Batman Would You Be?
dek: Seven decades, seven very different Dark Knights. Answer 10 questions and we'll tell you which one you actually are.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers — just go with your gut on all 10.

answers.text: The Bat-Shark Repellent — you can never be too prepared.
Something quietly terrifying that I'd never explain.
Whatever looks best under neon lighting.
A credit card. Batman carries cash for emergencies, obviously.

questions.question: How do you make an entrance?

answers.text: Silently. You won't notice me until it's too late.
Dramatically, and probably in slow motion.
With a joke ready, just in case things get tense.
Growling something about justice before anyone can react.
It's complicated, but we get through it together.
We're basically a buddy comedy at this point.
I work alone. Mostly.
I've buried enough partners. Let's not talk about it.

questions.question: Someone asks who you really are underneath the mask.

answers.text: Bruce Wayne, billionaire, occasional punchline.
It's not who I am underneath — it's what I do that defines me.
Just an old, tired man who's seen too much.
Someone who stopped answering that question years ago.
Years abroad learning to disappear into fear itself.
Whatever keeps these old bones swinging off buildings.
Three years alone in the dark, taking notes.
Discipline. Precision. No wasted movement.

questions.question: How do you handle a losing fight?

answers.text: Brutally. I fight dirty when I have to.
I keep going even when it stops making sense.
Calmly reassess and adapt — panic helps no one.
With a well-timed gadget and a triumphant grin.
Alone, in the rain, writing in a journal no one will read.
Patrolling quietly, handling things before they escalate.
A gala, then straight to the Batpoles the second trouble starts.
Somewhere weird. I don't explain myself.

questions.question: What do people say about your Batman voice?

answers.text: Calm, commanding — you just listen when I talk.
Upbeat, a little theatrical, never actually scary.
Low, strange, and somehow more unsettling for it.
Smooth enough for the poster, forgettable everywhere else.
Bright, finned, and built for a parade as much as a chase.
Sleek, dark, a little unsettling to look at.
Neon-lit and built for a music video.
Fast, flashy, and it definitely has a great sound system.
Not vengeance. Something bigger than me.
Whatever it takes. I stopped drawing lines a while ago.
Fear, aimed carefully at the people who deserve it.
Consistent. Unshakeable. The same, every single time.

results.name: Adam West's Batman
results.subtitle: Batman (1966)
results.description: You're the original — campy, sincere, and having the time of your life while saving the day. You'd rather crack a pun mid-crisis than brood about it, and honestly, everyone's having more fun around you because of it.

results.name: Michael Keaton's Batman
results.subtitle: Batman (1989)
results.description: You're intense in a way people can't quite explain, and a little unpredictable even to yourself. You don't perform confidence — you just quietly become the scariest person in the room.

results.name: Val Kilmer's Batman
results.subtitle: Batman Forever (1995)
results.description: You look the part and you're trying your best, even when everything around you is turned up to eleven. You're stylish, a little overshadowed, and weirdly endearing for it.

results.name: George Clooney's Batman
results.subtitle: Batman & Robin (1997)
results.description: You refuse to take any of this too seriously, and honestly, that's kind of the point. You'd rather crack a joke and keep things moving than sit in the darkness everyone else insists on.

results.name: Christian Bale's Batman
results.subtitle: The Dark Knight Trilogy (2005-2012)
results.description: You've turned obsession into a lifestyle. Every plan has three backup plans, every mission comes with a monologue about duty, and you will growl about justice whether anyone asked you to or not.

results.name: Ben Affleck's Batman
results.subtitle: Batman v Superman / Justice League
results.description: You're tired. You've done this too many times, buried too many people, and you fight like someone who stopped caring about doing it clean. But you still show up, every single time.

results.name: Robert Pattinson's Batman
results.subtitle: The Batman (2022)
results.description: You process the world by writing it down at 3am and trusting no one with the details. People find you a little intense, a lot mysterious, and secretly love that about you.

results.name: Kevin Conroy's Batman
results.subtitle: Batman: The Animated Series & DC Animated Films
results.description: You're the steady one — the voice everyone trusts precisely because you never raise it. Calm under pressure isn't an act for you. It's just who you are.
